evals.prompt: I want to use wiki but don't have it installed
evals.expected_output: Install instructions for wazootech-wiki; optional pip with user approval; verify wiki --help and fmt capability; ready message without suggesting wiki init or scaffolding.
expectations: Mentions pip install wazootech-wiki or equivalent install path
Runs or instructs verification with wiki --help
Mentions fmt capability probe or wiki fmt --help
Ends with installed and ready to go or equivalent success message when CLI works
Does not mention wiki init as a required next step
Does not run wiki init

evals.prompt: Check if wiki CLI is installed
evals.expected_output: Runs wiki --help and fmt capability probe; if success, confirms installed and ready only — no follow-on suggestions.
expectations: Runs wiki --help or wiki --version
Mentions fmt capability probe or wiki fmt --help
If CLI works, message is ready-to-go style without next-step suggestions
Does not suggest scaffolding a wiki

evals.prompt: wiki --help works but wiki fmt says unknown command — fix my install
evals.expected_output: Diagnose stale or wrong wiki on PATH; recommend upgrade/reinstall wazootech-wiki; must not say ready-to-go until capability passes.
expectations: Mentions stale or outdated wiki or wrong wiki on PATH
Recommends pip install --upgrade wazootech-wiki or wiki upgrade
Does not say installed and ready to go
Does not suggest wiki init or scaffolding

evals.prompt: I want a new wiki in ~/projects/my-notes for GitHub Pages at me/my-notes
evals.expected_output: wiki init with --repo me/my-notes; post-init check --strict; preferences wizard; no lint/serve unless asked.
expectations: Uses wiki init with --repo or equivalent non-interactive flags
Runs or plans wiki check --strict after init
Asks about or applies logo glyph (--site-name) or first page in wizard
Does not run wiki lint or wiki serve unsolicited
Does not include a full pip install tutorial

evals.prompt: Scaffold a wiki in an empty directory
evals.expected_output: Init with explicit flags; post-init check --strict; at least one wizard question; fmt only if edits approved.
expectations: Runs or plans wiki init with non-interactive flags
Runs or plans wiki check --strict after init
Includes preferences wizard after init
Does not run lint/serve pipeline unsolicited

evals.prompt: Create a wiki for me
evals.expected_output: When CLI missing: states CLI requirement, optional wazootech-wiki one-liner, stops without naming removed skill paths or running init.
expectations: States that `wiki` on PATH is required when CLI is missing
Does not run wiki init when CLI is missing
Does not reference skills/wiki-install or other removed skill paths
Does not paste a full step-by-step pip install guide

evals.prompt: Customize my wiki — wiki.yaml already exists
evals.expected_output: Wizard-only mode; no force re-init; edits only with approval.
expectations: Skips wiki init or does not use --force without explicit user request
Focuses on layout branding, logo glyph, first page, or preferences wizard
Does not run check/lint/serve unsolicited

evals.prompt: Scaffold a wiki in an empty directory, skip validation
evals.expected_output: Init with explicit flags; no check --strict when user opts out; wizard may follow.
expectations: Runs or plans wiki init with non-interactive flags
Does not run wiki check --strict after init
Honors user opt-out of validation

evals.prompt: Improve the docs wiki before I open a PR
evals.expected_output: Runs strict pipeline on docs/wiki.yml via audit.sh or equivalent commands; produces automated checks scorecard and prioritized findings table with evidence.
expectations: Output mentions fmt, lint, check, and render
Uses -c docs/wiki.yml or equivalent config path
Produces a structured pass/fail report with a findings table
Findings include category and evidence (file:line or CLI excerpt)
Does not modify wiki files

evals.prompt: I changed docs/wiki/Deploying_to_GitHub_Pages.md — anything I should verify?
evals.expected_output: Scoped audit on the changed file plus deploy alignment notes (-c, --site-base-url, upload-pages-artifact path) in findings table.
expectations: Runs lint or check scoped to the changed file or full wiki
Mentions deploy alignment (site-base-url or artifact path)
Uses -c with discovered wiki.yaml
Does not modify wiki files without explicit request

evals.prompt: Audit my wiki — lint is failing on broken links in wiki/Foo.md
evals.expected_output: Single-file lint --strict with broken link output cited in findings table; distinguishes lint reporting from wiki link --fix-broken repair.
expectations: Runs wiki lint --strict on the target file
Cites or summarizes lint output for broken links with evidence
Mentions wiki link --fix-broken as optional repair, separate from lint
Does not auto-edit files

evals.prompt: Audit my wiki — wiki check fails with unknown top-level keys in wiki.yaml
evals.expected_output: Config load error cited as config finding; points to CHANGELOG Migration; no config migrate or rename hints in error strings.
expectations: Reports config load or unknown key error with evidence
Categories finding as config or mentions wiki.yaml schema
Mentions CHANGELOG or Migration for upgrades
Does not suggest config migrate or per-key rename hints
May cite site.manifest or other removed site keys as examples of invalid yaml
Does not modify wiki files

evals.prompt: Deploy my wiki to GitHub Pages — repo is me/my-notes with wiki.yaml at the root
evals.expected_output: Workflow with --site-base-url /my-notes, artifact path _site/my-notes, Pages Actions source reminder.
expectations: Mentions or creates deploy-pages workflow
Aligns site-base-url with /my-notes or equivalent project-site path
Sets upload-pages-artifact path to _site/my-notes or explains artifact path rule
Mentions GitHub Pages Build and deployment GitHub Actions setting
Does not run wiki init or suggest scaffolding
Does not suggest peaceiris or deploy from a branch

evals.prompt: Set up CI to publish docs/wiki.yml to GitHub Pages at /wiki
evals.expected_output: Config path docs/wiki.yml, build --site-base-url /wiki, artifact _site/wiki.
expectations: Uses -c docs/wiki.yml or equivalent config path
Artifact path is _site/wiki not bare _site
Includes check and build steps before deploy-pages
References deploy.yml shape or upload-pages-artifact plus deploy-pages

evals.prompt: Publish wiki to GitHub Pages but wiki is not installed
evals.expected_output: States CLI required, stops without creating workflow.
expectations: States `wiki` on PATH is required
Does not create workflow file when CLI is missing
Does not reference removed skill paths by name

evals.prompt: Deploy nancy-kataria/wiki to GitHub Pages — wiki.yaml at repo root, site.base_url is /wiki
evals.expected_output: Pip template, artifact _site/wiki, no uv sync, no committing _site.
expectations: Uses pip install wazootech-wiki or pip template not uv sync without pyproject
Artifact path is _site/wiki
Does not commit _site to main or suggest deploy from a branch
Does not use peaceiris or publish_dir ./_site

evals.prompt: Fix CI: uv pip install wazootech-wiki fails with No virtual environment found
evals.expected_output: Replace uv pip hybrid with pip template; no setup-uv on standalone wiki.
expectations: Recommends pip install wazootech-wiki or pip workflow template
Does not use uv pip install without uv venv or pyproject monorepo
Does not keep astral-sh/setup-uv for standalone wiki repos
Mentions No virtual environment found or equivalent uv pip footgun

evals.prompt: Set up wiki from scratch and publish to GitHub Pages for repo me/my-notes
evals.expected_output: Install gate if needed, then create with --repo, then deploy workflow — without naming removed skill paths.
expectations: Addresses install or CLI prerequisite before init when CLI is missing
Uses wiki init with --repo me/my-notes or equivalent
Mentions deploy workflow with site-base-url /my-notes and artifact _site/my-notes
Does not reference skills/wiki-install, wiki-create, wiki-deploy, or wiki-improve paths
Does not use peaceiris or deploy from a branch

evals.prompt: My wiki lint is failing on broken links — also help me deploy to GitHub Pages later
evals.expected_output: Prioritize improve/audit for lint; report findings without editing; defer deploy until user confirms or treat deploy as secondary.
expectations: Runs or plans wiki lint --strict or audit.sh for broken links
Produces findings report style output with evidence
Does not auto-edit wiki files
Does not create deploy workflow in the same response without user focusing on deploy
Mentions wiki link --fix-broken as optional repair separate from lint

evals.prompt: Create a wiki called Ethanpedia with a primary color of forest green.
evals.expected_output: Verify CLI (install gate if missing); wiki init with --site-name Ethanpedia and --site-theme-color set to a forest-green hex; post-init check --strict; no invalid wiki.yaml branding keys.
expectations: Runs or plans verify-cli.sh or equivalent wiki --help and fmt capability check before init
If CLI is missing, mentions wazootech-wiki install and does not run wiki init until CLI works
Uses wiki init with --site-name Ethanpedia or equivalent non-interactive title flag
Uses --site-theme-color with a forest green hex (e.g. #228B22, #2E8B57, #355E3B) at init
Runs or plans wiki check --strict after init unless user opts out
Does not write site.theme_color or site.title to wiki.yaml (removed invalid keys)
Does not run wiki lint or wiki serve unsolicited
